response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical breadth and 19+ years of software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and specialized domains. His current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, his resume lacks a clear portfolio of demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, which is the core differentiator for this AI Strategy role. An interview should explore the depth of his AI work and his strategic vision for cloud-native AI systems.
strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year requirement, with demonstrated technical leadership across multiple domains (full-stack, infrastructure, high-performance systems, robotics)
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and developer tooling at re:cinq, showing recent deep engagement with AI systems

Multi-dimensional technical depth enabling strategic advising: cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), high-scale systems (millions of requests/sec), real-time applications, and open-source platform building
concerns: Limited demonstrated track record of building AI/ML products or platforms that achieved market impact—critical for 'recognized AI expertise' required in preferred qualifications
No advanced degree in AI, ML, or related field, which is preferred for a director-level AI strategy role, though not required
Resume does not clearly showcase strategic cloud platform thinking or customer/partner advisory on AI adoption—core responsibilities of the position

key_factors.factor: Experience depth and breadth (19+ years across multiple domains)
Current AI-infrastructure exposure and technical relevance
